creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please add the patch [1] from GH issue 1394 [2], with the patch I haven't seen broken upgrades.

I plan to push an upgrade for postfix and have no good feeling, w.o. the patch 11 from 40 systems had a broken postfix since not all binaries where replaced during the upgrade.

[1] https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/commit/34f3802a9e68f60e54671dca159c9e788063e291
[2] https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/issues/1394
